# kanidm_account_policy (Resource)

Manages account policy on a Kanidm group.

Account policy defines security requirements for accounts that are members of the group. Policy is resolved across all groups a user belongs to, with the strictest setting winning.

## Example Usage

```hcl
resource "kanidm_account_policy" "all_persons" {
  group                       = "idm_all_persons"
  authsession_expiry          = 3600
  auth_password_minimum_length = 10
}

resource "kanidm_account_policy" "admins" {
  group                       = kanidm_group.admins.name
  authsession_expiry          = 86400
  privilege_expiry            = 900
  auth_password_minimum_length = 12
  credential_type_minimum     = "mfa"
  allow_primary_cred_fallback = false
}
```



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group` (String) Group name, SPN, UUID, or a kanidm_group ID reference. The account_policy class will be enabled on this group.

### Optional

- `allow_primary_cred_fallback` (Boolean) Allow fallback to primary password for LDAP authentication when no POSIX password exists.
- `auth_password_minimum_length` (Number) Minimum character length for passwords.
- `authsession_expiry` (Number) Maximum authentication session duration in seconds.
- `credential_type_minimum` (String) Minimum credential strength. Valid values: any, mfa, passkey, attested_passkey.
- `limit_search_max_filter_test` (Number) Maximum number of entries examined in a partially indexed query.
- `limit_search_max_results` (Number) Maximum number of query results returned in a single search operation.
- `privilege_expiry` (Number) Maximum privileged session duration in seconds. Maximum value is 3600.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
